app-info.name: Journal
app-info.description: A personal journal and activity log with encrypted local storage. Create entries with rich text, tags, categories, places, and weather data. Supports multiple password-protected journals, custom report templates, and data export/import.

release.change: Added pin/unpin entries with Pinned Entries panel on dashboard
Added max pinned entries setting in Preferences (1-100, default 10)
Added Default Entry View option in custom views editor (only one allowed)
Added entry viewer font family and size settings in Preferences with live preview
Added Android swipe left/right on entry view for prev/next navigation
Added Android collapsible filter fields on entry list (starts collapsed)
Dashboard pinned custom view buttons now show matching entry count badges
Added Custom Views page with advanced filtering (AND/OR/NOT), grouping, multi-field sorting, display mode
Added 3 new themes (Navy, Sunflower, Meadow) with 3D styled UI
Added entry list pagination with configurable page size
Added entry list Card/List view toggle with date-first card layout
Added "Show All" button to Dashboard Top Tags, Categories, and Places panels
Added Pre-fill Templates with description field for one-click new entry creation
Added Dashboard quick action buttons for pinned custom filter views (max 10)
Added batch deletion of entries with multi-select mode
Added CSV import duplicate detection (Date+Title matching) with skipped entries log
Added custom date/time format inputs for CSV import (saved as defaults)
Added SQL Explorer with visual query builder and raw SQL text input
Added Print PDF button on entry view with template selection
Added entry view tabbed layout (Main / Misc tabs)
Added 4 new themes (Amethyst, Aurora, Lavender, Frost)
Added navbar icons on all buttons, Settings moved to right side
Added inline template editor on Reports page
Added search progress bar with debounced filtering
Added geocoding provider setting (Photon, Nominatim, Google)
Added Android hardware back button mapped to app navigation
Added read-only entry view page with quick edit button
Added clickable dashboard stat cards to filter entry list
Added entry numbering and filter criteria summary box
Added column layout toggle (1/2/3 columns) on card screens
Added CSV export from Settings with all fields double-quoted
Added "Warn before delete" preference toggle
Added custom views with saved filter combinations (AND/OR logic)
Added entry list field visibility settings
Added multi-theme support: Light, Dark, Ocean, Midnight, Forest
Added custom HTML report templates with field substitution tags
Added report generation from templates (inline view and download)
Added auto-open last journal toggle
Added weather import via Open-Meteo API
Added About modal with app info
Initial release
Multi-journal support with per-journal password encryption (AES-256-GCM)
Rich text editing with Quill.js
Dashboard with stats and ranked lists
Search and filter entries by text, category, tag, date range
Reports: HTML view, print, CSV export, PDF export
Data export/import as encrypted JSON
Android WebView app with shared web assets
